_meta.notes: aspects = essentia/vis cost (null value = computed at runtime, see aspectsComputed). output/input/central/components/inputs/key resolved to EN/RU names where the item ref maps to a lang key; otherwise {ref,meta} or {vanilla:srgName} or {oredict}. research = linked research key. arcane has shape[] (grid rows) + key{char:ingredient}. infusion has instability + central + components[]. warpItems = sanity (warp) gained from holding/crafting items.
